---
title: "J & J"
---

## Introduction

### Financial Statements

-   [Johnson & Johnson earnings](https://www.jnj.com/tag/earnings)

| Year | Q1 | Q2 | Q3 | Q4 |
|--------------|--------------|--------------|--------------|----------------|
| 2021 | [2021 Q1](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/johnson-johnsons-2021-first-quarter-earnings-report-what-you-need-to-know) | [2021 Q2](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/johnson-johnsons-2021-second-quarter-earnings-report-what-you-need-to-know) | [2021 Q3](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/johnson-johnsons-2021-third-quarter-earnings-report-what-you-need-to-know) | [2021 Q4](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/what-you-need-to-know-about-johnson-johnsons-2021-full-year-earnings-report) |
| 2022 | [2022 Q1](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/what-you-need-to-know-about-johnson-johnsons-2022-first-quarter-earnings) | [2022 Q2](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/johnson-johnsons-2022-2nd-quarter-earnings-report-what-you-need-to-know) | [2022 Q3](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/what-you-need-to-know-about-johnson-johnsons-2022-third-quarter-earnings) | [2022 Q4](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/what-you-need-to-know-about-johnson-johnsons-full-year-earnings-report) |
| 2023 | [2023 Q1](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/what-you-need-to-know-about-johnson-johnsons-2023-first-quarter-earnings) | [2023 Q2](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/what-you-need-to-know-about-johnson-johnsons-2023-second-quarter-earnings) | [2023 Q3](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/what-you-need-to-know-about-johnson-johnsons-2023-third-quarter-earnings) | [2023 Q4](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/what-you-need-to-know-about-johnson-johnsons-2023-fourth-quarter-and-full-year-earnings-report) |
| 2024 | [2024 Q1](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/what-you-need-to-know-about-johnson-johnsons-2024-first-quarter-earnings) | [2024 Q2](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/what-you-need-to-know-about-johnson-johnsons-2024-second-quarter-earnings) | [2024 Q3](https://www.jnj.com/latest-news/what-you-need-to-know-about-johnson-johnsons-2024-third-quarter-earnings) |  |
